taskName: Run Whole App Page API Smoke

scope.notes: T13 proves runtime smoke only. Final product acceptance remains T16.

commands.command: node -e evidence summary checks for API IDs, failed responses, screenshots, console errors, and DB counts

runtime.browser: Google Chrome headless via Chrome DevTools Protocol
runtime.shutdown: T13 harness shuts down the temporary Next dev server and browser before exit.

evidence.summary: Next dev server reached ready state and served the live app/API.
Chrome DevTools endpoint started for the headless browser run.
46 live browser/API responses captured; API-001 through API-013 are present; zero HTTP response status >= 400.
Runtime DB readback has one user, upload, draw session, generation job, aura card, activation, saved card, four share events, and fifteen analytics events.
Trace JSON records ten screenshot checkpoints and zero console/blocking console errors.
Home, context, upload, draw, result, activate, activated, share, saved, and saved-copy screenshots captured.

repairRecord.issue: Initial T13 harness could not spawn pnpm.cmd with shell:false on this Windows surface.
repairRecord.repair: Ran pnpm through cmd.exe for DB setup and started Next directly through node_modules/next/dist/bin/next.

repairRecord.issue: Headless browser initially crashed or disconnected under default Edge/Chrome GPU mode.
repairRecord.repair: Switched to installed Chrome with headless CDP, no-sandbox, and software rendering flags.

repairRecord.issue: The harness waited for text while document.body was not yet available.
Duplicate React draw-page effects raced into a Prisma unique constraint and one /draw-sessions/start request returned 500.
repairRecord.repair: Made draw-session creation atomic/idempotent with Prisma upsert on userId + drawSeed.

repairRecord.issue: Web analytics events emitted by the client were rejected by the shared server validator and surfaced as 400 console errors.
repairRecord.repair: Added the Web P0 analytics event names to the shared analytics-events contract.

repairRecord.issue: The harness clicked draw controls before the draw-session response enabled them.
repairRecord.repair: Added enabled-state waits before selecting Card II and revealing the aura.

repairRecord.issue: The share-page download action tried to launch a local:// renderer URL and favicon produced a 404 browser console event.
repairRecord.repair: Download now falls back to the share URL for local-only renderer paths, and /favicon.ico returns 204.

repairRecord.issue: A passing smoke run left child processes alive until the outer command timed out.
repairRecord.repair: Started Next without shell wrapping, destroyed the CDP socket on cleanup, killed child processes, and exited explicitly after evidence was written.

repairRecord.issue: Lint flagged T13 harness style warnings.
repairRecord.repair: Removed the unused rerun variable and expanded ternary side-effect expressions.

rerunResumeState.notes: T13 evidence is runtime/browser based, not a static local smoke substitute. T14/T15/T16 must not infer final product PASS from this T13 task alone.
